rationale: The citing paper references Moreau et al. (2020) mainly as part of grouped background citations that document generally positive effects of mass customization (e.g., higher willingness to pay at first purchase). It is also cited once in a broad future-research remark about possible moderators (product and brand type). The citing paper does not engage the cited paper's specific luxury-brand theory, findings, measures, or design as a basis for its hypotheses or analyses.
